title: Build Systems, Not Code - Angie Jones, Agentic AI Foundation
summary: Angie Jones argues that AI coding agents shift engineering focus from writing individual lines of code to designing agentic systems at a higher level. Traditional engineering principles like systems thinking, decomposition, and state management remain valuable and necessary in an AI-native world.
